title: lithospermum callosum
intro: Lithospermum callosum, also known as Calumba root, is a perennial plant native to tropical Africa that has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The root of the plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. Lithospermum callosum has been traditionally used to treat digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions, and its medicinal properties are also believed to have a protective effect on the liver and kidneys. Herbal preparations of Lithospermum callosum can be made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, and are available in some health food stores and online retailers.
